message:
feat(confluence,shopify,square): expand manifests, add operations, improve formatting

Confluence: Add spaces_get, pages_list, pages_get, pages_create,
search_cql, and self_check operation definitions to manifest with full
network constraints. Expand client with new endpoint methods. Improve
connector initialization and operation routing. Update main.rs binary
entry point.

Shopify: Update interface hash in manifest to reflect expanded schema.
Add network_constraints blocks for customers.get and other operations.
Update migration_hint to document credential_id auth mode. Minor client
and connector auth-handling cleanups.

Square: Reformat connector code for consistency (rustfmt-style chain
formatting for ok_or error expressions and client initialization).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@ schema_version = "2.1"

-description = "Atlassian Confluence wiki connector for managing spaces, pages, and search"
+description = "Tenant-scoped Atlassian Confluence Cloud connector for spaces, pages, CQL search, and health operations"
